name: midisnipe
description: A live-rig MIDI diagnostic console for the web and desktop.

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env MIDISNIPE_DEV_SERVER=http://localhost:3000 electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run build:desktop:web && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:desktop:web && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:desktop:web && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:desktop:web && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --linux --publish never
